ValidationRule.description: This Validation rule ensures CTM Units Quote has a valid Dealer regions with the corresponding Warehouse Locations
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.Name ='CTM Units Quote', AND(NOT(ISNULL(TEXT(Warehouse__c))) ,NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Warehouse__c)))), OR (AND (OR($User.CTM_Dealer_Region_1__c, $User.CTM_Dealer_Region_2__c ),TEXT(Warehouse__c)!='Precio de México'), AND($User.CTM_Dealer_Region_3__c,AND(TEXT(Warehouse__c)!='Planta de Manufactura',TEXT(Warehouse__c)!='Precio Especial Manufactura',TEXT(Warehouse__c)!='Panama'))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For CTM Units Quote Combination of Dealer Region and Warehouse is Incorrect.
